summary: Applied ADR 0304 from the latest origin/main baseline by replaying Step-CA, OpenBao, and Windmill on top of repo version 0.177.142, fixing the current-main Docker bridge recovery, PostgreSQL pgaudit retry, and Windmill API readiness races surfaced during the replay, refreshing Atlas snapshots, re-verifying both repo-side and seeded Windmill drift detection clean across the cataloged PostgreSQL databases, and then integrating the exact-main release surfaces for repo version 0.177.143 and platform version 0.130.90.

verification.observed: make converge-step-ca env=production succeeded from the rebased ADR 0304 worktree with final recap docker-runtime-lv3 : ok=144 changed=2 failed=0 rescued=1 and proxmox_florin : ok=54 changed=4 failed=0.
make converge-openbao env=production succeeded from the rebased ADR 0304 worktree with final recap docker-runtime-lv3 : ok=381 changed=8 failed=0 and postgres-lv3 : ok=75 changed=1 failed=0.

make converge-windmill env=production finished cleanly after the exact-main replay fixes with final recap docker-runtime-lv3 : ok=364 changed=47 failed=0, postgres-lv3 : ok=95 changed=6 failed=0, and proxmox_florin : ok=41 changed=4 failed=0.

make atlas-refresh-snapshots, make atlas-validate, make atlas-lint, and make atlas-drift-check all completed successfully after the exact-main replay, with drift_count 0 across the 20 cataloged PostgreSQL databases and no emitted NATS or ntfy notifications.
scripts/windmill_run_wait_result.py against f/lv3/atlas_drift_check returned status ok with report.status clean, drift_count 0, and no published notifications.
The latest-main regression slice passed with 44 tests covering linux_guest_firewall, postgres_vm, windmill_runtime, and compose runtime secret injection behavior.

The release-cut tree validated cleanly: validation-runner contracts passed, generated-docs passed after regenerating the ADR index, canonical truth, the platform manifest, and shared diagrams, agent-standards passed, and git diff --check reported no whitespace or conflict-marker defects before the mainline push.

notes: This receipt supersedes receipts/live-applies/2026-04-01-adr-0304-atlas-mainline-live-apply.json as the authoritative exact-main proof for ADR 0304.

An earlier diagnostic drift run briefly captured a mautrix_discord mismatch while other agents were applying concurrent changes; the later exact-main snapshot refresh plus the clean repo-side and seeded drift checks in this receipt are the authoritative verification set.
This is the exact-main receipt that justifies the platform version bump from 0.130.89 to 0.130.90 after the merged ADR 0304 workstream was replayed from the latest origin/main baseline.
